evals.name: eval-minimal-constant-contribution-review
evals.prompt: Review or write the smallest complete Verilog-A module that declares one electrical output and contributes a constant zero voltage. Focus only on includes, module syntax, analog block syntax, and contribution syntax.
evals.expected_output: A complete syntax probe or review notes covering standard includes, explicit electrical output declaration, an analog block, and one constant V(out) <+ 0.0 contribution.

evals.name: eval-declaration-parameter-message-review
evals.prompt: Review or write a Verilog-A syntax probe that declares real and integer parameters and prints them with $strobe at initial_step. Keep the artifact limited to declarations and message syntax.
evals.expected_output: A complete syntax probe or review notes covering typed parameter declarations, @(initial_step), and $strobe formatting.

evals.name: eval-cross-event-logging-review
evals.prompt: Review or write a Verilog-A syntax probe with rising and falling cross events that only logs $abstime.
evals.expected_output: A complete syntax probe or review notes covering @(cross(...,+1)), @(cross(...,-1)), $abstime, and $strobe, with no persistent event-derived output behavior.

evals.name: eval-branch-access-zero-review
evals.prompt: Review or write a Verilog-A syntax probe that declares two independent named branches and demonstrates V(branch) and I(branch) access with constant zero contributions only.
evals.expected_output: A complete syntax probe or review notes covering two branch declarations, V(branch) <+ 0.0, and I(branch) <+ 0.0.

evals.name: eval-vector-genvar-zero-review
evals.prompt: Review or write a Verilog-A syntax probe with a vector electrical output and a genvar loop that contributes constant zero to each bit.
evals.expected_output: A complete syntax probe or review notes covering vector electrical declaration, genvar, for-loop contribution syntax, and constant zero contributions only.
